final:
module SRT_Divider(
    input signed [7:0] minuend,
    input signed [7:0] divisor,
    output reg signed [7:0] quotient,
    output reg signed [7:0] remainder
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (divisor == 0) begin
            quotient = 0;
            remainder = minuend;
        end else begin
            quotient = minuend / divisor; // Integer division
            remainder = minuend % divisor; // Remainder
        end
    end
endmodule
